entry.title: New: Bill 127, CD1 (2025) (Maui) — Agenda Ready
entry.content:
"A BILL FOR AN ORDINANCE AMENDING THE FISCAL YEAR 2026 BUDGET, INCREASING ESTIMATED REVENUES, BOND/LAPSED BOND BY $5,862,123, CAPITAL IMPROVEMENT PROJECTS, DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE, MAKAWAO-PUKALANI-KULA COMMUNITY PLAN AREA, AND APPENDIX C, DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE, MAKAWAO-PUKALANI-KULA COMMUNITY PLAN AREA, NEW APPROPRIATION FOR KULA AGRICULTURAL PARK OF $5,862,123"

Council of the County of Maui

View on the council site
